channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 67/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 67/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 46.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Burnham warns ‘big changes’ needed in UK after Starmer says he would back mayor at by-election
item.description: Politics latest: Burnham warns ‘big changes’ needed in UK after Starmer says he would back mayor at by-election

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Britain ‘been on wrong path for 40 years’, says Andy Burnham – UK politics live
item.description: Britain ‘been on wrong path for 40 years’, says Andy Burnham – UK politics live

item.title: ITVX: Starmer will back Labour's Makerfield by-election candidate '100%' - ITVX
item.description: Starmer will back Labour's Makerfield by-election candidate '100%' - ITVX

item.title: BBC Politics: Andy Burnham: 'King of the North' with eyes on the top job
item.description: Andy Burnham: 'King of the North' with eyes on the top job

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Voices: Starmer, Burnham, Streeting or Rayner? Tell us who should lead Labour into the next general election
item.description: Voices: Starmer, Burnham, Streeting or Rayner? Tell us who should lead Labour into the next general election

item.title: FT UK Politics: Labour infighting over Brexit will put Farage in power, warns Lammy
item.description: Labour infighting over Brexit will put Farage in power, warns Lammy

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Tories should make pact with Reform in bid to defeat Burnham in by-election, Jacob Rees-Mogg suggests
item.description: Tories should make pact with Reform in bid to defeat Burnham in by-election, Jacob Rees-Mogg suggests

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer’s opponents are paving way for Labour’s destruction, Lammy warns
item.description: Starmer’s opponents are paving way for Labour’s destruction, Lammy warns

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer is not setting out timetable for his departure, says David Lammy
item.description: Starmer is not setting out timetable for his departure, says David Lammy

item.title: The Guardian: IMF urges UK to ‘stay the course’ on borrowing amid Starmer uncertainty - The Guardian
item.description: IMF urges UK to ‘stay the course’ on borrowing amid Starmer uncertainty - The Guardian
